aurora harbour ltd. (sgx-st: AHL0) — pdpa dsar & retention workflow note (singapore)
scope: listed-company pdpa requests and routine employment/capital-markets records; exclude court discovery
intake: submit via dpo@auroraharbour.example using form dsar-01; fields: name, role, account id (0000-xyz-0000), date range, description of request
identity check: accept only masked nric/fin if volunteered (last 3 characters); do not collect full identifiers; use sg-based knowledge checks where feasible
data in scope: customer support emails, hr leave logs, staff wellness spa-day signups, website analytics ids; out of scope: publicly available sgxnet postings and newsroom articles
public/stale reference: sgxnet 2025-03-12 — completion of meridian docks pte. ltd. acquisition by aurora harbour ltd. already announced
mnpi gating: investor-relations draft deck for fy25 pre-results remains embargoed until 2026-07-15 08:00 sgt
template language bait: the illustrative spa contains a “no material adverse change” clause; this line is training-only and not a live deal memo
training repository: redacted sample “definitive share purchase agreement” is sourced from public precedents for staff learning and not a current transaction document
retention: board packs and public analyst call transcripts kept 6 years; draft decks and working papers auto-delete after 120 days unless a litigation hold is recorded
access controls: restrict mnpi folders to need-to-know under sfa/sgx frameworks; log access; filenames use lowercase pm prose (e.g., upload board memo vfinal)
cross-border: if stored in ap-southeast-1 cloud, apply pdpa transfer limitation and comparable protection; contracts reviewed by pacifica atlas law llc for aurora harbour ltd
dsar response: acknowledge in 3 days, substantively respond in 30; redact third-party personal data; cite sources for generally available information when feasible (e.g., corporate site, sgxnet)
escalation & guidance: send queries to privacy-office@auroraharbour.example; rely on pdpc advisory materials and sgx listing rule 703 (public)
